title: Account Center
sign_in_hint: Sign in to manage your cloud account and credits.

monthly_free.title: Free Credits
monthly_free.description: 3,000 free credits per month, resets on the 1st at 00:00 (UTC+0)

paid_credits.title: Paid Credits
paid_credits.checkout_opened: Checkout opened in your browser. Please complete payment there.
paid_credits.checkout_failed: Failed to create checkout session. Please try again.
paid_credits.checkout_invalid_url: Invalid checkout URL returned by server.
paid_credits.payment_success: Payment succeeded. Credits have been updated.
paid_credits.payment_failed: Payment failed. Please try again later.
paid_credits.waiting_for_confirmation: Waiting for payment confirmation from server...
paid_credits.reconcile_failed: Failed to reconcile payment status. Please try again.
paid_credits.still_pending: Payment is still pending. Keep this dialog open.
paid_credits.polling_failed: Unable to query payment status. Retrying...
paid_credits.result_failed: Payment failed or was not completed.

device_flow.browser_opened: A browser window has been opened for authorization
device_flow.enter_code_hint: Enter the code below in your browser to complete sign in
device_flow.expired: The authorization code has expired. Please try again.
